comment: Thresholds pre-committed from VE-002-supplier-payment-mapping.md BEFORE the run. Fill 'observed' after field work, then: python3 opportunity-intelligence/tools/run.py verdict knowledge-base/validation/VE-002-result.json

metrics.name: card_acceptance_share_pct
metrics.description: % of mapped supplier relationships card-payable without surcharge (today or stated willingness)

metrics.name: spend_coverage_pct
metrics.description: % of merchants' monthly supplier spend (by value) covered by those card-payable relationships

on_pass: Build OPP-002 full commercial model + MVP design; feed supplier-side feasibility into OPP-006
on_fail: Reclassify OPP-002 as Weak in BACKLOG.md with the acceptance data as the decisive record
on_inconclusive: Acceptance share passed but spend coverage below 30%: extend supplier calls by 10 before deciding, per spec
